ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-25-2006 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SPECIALLY SET A TRIAL DATE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D) WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 8/14/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 8/4/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULATED TO. AN ECONOMIC REPORT AND/OR OFFER OF THEIR EXPERT ECONOMIST FOR DEPOSITION WILL BE SERVED BY FAX NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: VERA MU/JIROQUE; REPORTER: RITA HOWELL # 2542 (206)

Robert A. Rich of Kasowitz, Benson, Torres & Friedman, LLP, 293-8241, appearing for defendant and moving party

Mr. Worsey requested a change to the continued hearing date and the Court modified its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CYRUS AMAX MINERALS COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's request for a continuance is granted and continued to 8/9/06 to permit Plaintiff to offer evidence from person most knowledgeable deposition if it occurs to try to show existence of triable issue of material fact. If supplemental briefing is to be filed, the supplemental opposition is due August 7, 2006, with the supplemental reply due August 8, 2006. (301/PJB/ck) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
